item.title: 曝三星显示获折叠屏 iPhone 面板独供认证
item.guid: 曝三星显示获折叠屏-iPhone-面板独供认证
item.description:
According to reports from "KeChuangBan Daily", Samsung Display, a subsidiary of Samsung Electronics, has passed Apple's foldable OLED module mass production certification and has been approved to start mass production of panels for Apple's first foldable iPhone. 据《科创板日报》消息，三星电子控股子公司三星显示已通过苹果折叠 OLED 模组量产认证，获准启动苹果首款折叠屏 iPhone 配套面板的批量生产。

The report states that both parties have signed a three-year exclusive supply agreement, under which Apple will only procure foldable OLED panels from Samsung Display during the contract period. 报道称，双方已签署为期三年的独家供货协议，合约期内苹果将仅从三星显示采购折叠屏 OLED 面板。

The report mentioned that Samsung Display has activated some of its backend production lines at its Vietnam factory, with the first batch of approximately 3 million panels scheduled for delivery within the year. Apple set a mass production yield threshold of no less than 70% for foldable panels, and Samsung Display's final measured yield exceeded 80%. 报道提到，三星显示已启用越南工厂部分后段产线，首批约 300 万块面板计划于年内完成交付。苹果对折叠屏面板设定了不低于 70% 的量产良率门槛，三星显示最终实测良率突破 80%。

In terms of technical solutions, Samsung's customized new generation M-series emissive materials, combined with CoE encapsulated color filter technology, eliminate the traditional polarizer structure to reduce the risk of cracks caused by repeated bending at the fold and compress the panel thickness. 技术方案上，三星为苹果定制的新一代 M 系列发光材料搭配 CoE 封装彩色滤光技术，省去传统偏光片结构，以降低折叠处反复弯折带来的裂纹风险，并压缩面板厚度。

The first foldable iPhone is expected to adopt a horizontal folding form factor similar to the Galaxy Z Fold, featuring an approximately 7.7-inch inner screen and a 5.3-inch outer screen. The hinge component remains a variable for the release date, with Apple aiming for over 300,000 folds without damage. 首款折叠屏 iPhone 预计采用类似 Galaxy Z Fold 的横向折叠形态，配备约 7.7 英寸内屏和 5.3 英寸外屏；铰链部件仍是发布时间变量，苹果目标为 30 万次以上折叠无损伤。

item.title: 实测微信 AI：「小微」入驻首页首屏，朋友圈、群聊都能问
item.guid: 实测微信-AI：「小微」入驻首页首屏，朋友圈、群聊都能问
item.description:
WeChat recently launched its first native AI assistant, "Xiao Wei". A pair of green eyes has been added to the top left corner of the homepage; clicking it enters Xiao Wei, and a red dot on the icon will display the number of notifications. The secondary screen that previously displayed starred content by swiping right has now been replaced with Xiao Wei's complete homepage, making its entry level close to WeChat's primary entry point. 微信近日上线首个原生 AI 助手「小微」，首页左上角新增了一双绿色眼睛，点击即可进入小微，图标上还会以小红点显示通知数量。原先右滑展示星标内容的副屏，如今被替换为小微的完整主页，入口层级已接近微信一级入口。

According to APPSO's actual tests, "Xiao Wei" currently offers the following functions: 据 APPSO 实测，「小微」目前可实现以下功能：

    Xiao Wei claims its main model is WeChat's self-developed WeLM, with some answers assisted by DeepSeek rather than Hunyuan;

    The "+" icon in the chat box, the top right corner of official accounts and video accounts, and the long-press text menu can all summon "Ask Xiao Wei";

    It can send messages and red packets (both require user confirmation), and after authorization, it can check payment bills, summarize group chats and Moments (Moments can be searched for about two days, with clickable citation sources);

    Other functions: personalized product recommendations (jumps to WeChat Mini Store), official account content Q&A, AI image editing and generation (with "AI Generated" watermark), PDF summaries, saved notes and to-dos, as well as invoking mini-programs for ordering and appointments, and generating "mini-tools" with a single sentence (maximum 5, currently does not support mini-games, nor can they be shared or modified a second time);

    Conservative permissions: unable to modify settings, delete contacts, or send group messages; payment and privacy-related calls require prior authorization.

🔗 Detailed hands-on review: WeChat AI's most detailed experience across the web, I'm in love with Moments again 🔗 详细实测： 微信 AI 全网最细体验，我又爱上了刷朋友圈

item.title: 大疆 Osmo Pocket 4P 开售即售罄，二手市场溢价超千元
item.guid: 大疆-Osmo-Pocket-4P-开售即售罄，二手市场溢价超千元
item.description:
DJI's pocket cinema camera, Osmo Pocket 4P, officially went on sale last night and quickly sold out on online channels such as JD.com and Tmall. Some offline stores also reported no stock and long waiting times for reservations. 大疆口袋电影机 Osmo Pocket 4P 昨晚正式开售，随后在京东、天猫等线上渠道迅速售罄，部分线下门店也出现无现货、预约排队时间较长的情况。

The price trend chart of the Poizon App shows that the market transaction price of the Pocket 4P standard set once rose to 4999 yuan, an increase of 1200 yuan from the official release price, a surge of over 30%. 得物 App 价格趋势图显示，Pocket 4P 标准套装市场成交价一度上涨至 4999 元，较官方发售价上涨 1200 元，涨幅超过三成。

Sina Tech reported that the customer service of DJI's official flagship store stated that if an order cannot be placed or the product is delisted, it means there is no stock temporarily. Restock is expected at 8 PM on June 25th, but the restock quantity is not fixed, and replenishment may occur at any time after warehouse arrival. 新浪科技报道提到，DJI 大疆官方旗舰店客服表示，若无法下单或商品下架即代表暂无库存，预计 6 月 25 日 20 点补货，但补货数量不固定，仓库到货后也可能随时补货。

item.title: 联发科据称拿下 Google TPU V9 独家订单
item.guid: 联发科据称拿下-Google-TPU-V9-独家订单
item.description:
Ming-Chi Kuo, an analyst at Tianfeng International Securities, posted on X yesterday, stating that the latest industry survey shows MediaTek has secured an exclusive order for Google's upgraded TPU V9 chips. 天风国际证券分析师郭明錤昨日在 X 发帖称，最新产业调查显示，联发科已获得 Google 升级版 TPU V9 芯片独家订单。

Kuo Ming-Chi stated that Google will develop an upgraded v9 chip, possibly codenamed Triggerfish, based on TPU v9 / Humufish. It will be positioned as a more powerful inference-capable revision of TPU v9, with goals including mitigating the CPU wall and memory wall. 郭明錤称，Google 将在 TPU v9 / Humufish 基础上开发代号可能为 Triggerfish 的升级版 v9 芯片，定位为推理能力更强的 TPU v9 改版，目标包括缓解 CPU wall 与 memory wall。

Compared to Humufish, Triggerfish's main changes include a 2 to 3 times increase in SRAM capacity, the addition of a simulation die, and an upgrade of HBM specifications from HBM4 to HBM4E. 与 Humufish 相比，Triggerfish 的主要变化包括 SRAM 容量提升至前者的 2 至 3 倍、新增 simulation die，并将 HBM 规格由 HBM4 升级至 HBM4E。

Regarding shipment expectations, Ming-Chi Kuo stated that the estimated lifetime shipments of Humufish, at 4 to 5 million units, remain unchanged, while Google has additionally ordered 1 to 2 million Triggerfish chips. The chip is expected to begin production by the end of next year and ramp up in 2028. 在出货预期方面，郭明錤称 Humufish 生命周期 400 万至 500 万颗的出货预估维持不变，Google 额外追加 100 万至 200 万颗 Triggerfish 订单。该芯片预计明年底开始生产，并于 2028 年放量。

item.title: Meta 暂停员工追踪项目，曾收集鼠标点击和键盘输入
item.guid: Meta-暂停员工追踪项目，曾收集鼠标点击和键盘输入
item.description:
According to WIRED, Meta has suspended an employee tracking project. The project previously collected employee computer input information, including mouse movements, click locations, keystrokes, and screen content. The suspension was due to internal security issues that allowed more Meta employees to access some of the data collected by the project. 据 WIRED 报道，Meta 已暂停一项面向员工的追踪项目。该项目此前会收集员工电脑输入信息，包括鼠标移动、点击位置、键盘敲击以及屏幕内容。暂停原因是该项目收集的部分数据因内部安全问题，曾被更多 Meta 员工访问到。

According to WIRED, Meta has suspended the Model Compatibility Initiative (MCI) tool for employees. Launched among U.S. employees in April this year, the tool collected mouse movements, click locations, keystrokes, and screen content to train AI systems on how humans operate computer software. 据 WIRED 报道，Meta 已暂停面向员工的 Model Compatibility Initiative（MCI）工具。该工具今年 4 月在美国员工中推出，会收集鼠标移动、点击位置、键盘敲击和屏幕内容，用于训练 AI 系统学习人类操作电脑软件的方式。

The suspension was due to internal access permission issues with some data collected by MCI. Meta spokesperson Tracy Clayton stated that there is currently no indication that the relevant data was improperly accessed by employees, and the company will suspend the project during the investigation. 暂停原因是 MCI 收集的部分数据出现内部访问权限问题。Meta 发言人 Tracy Clayton 表示，目前没有迹象显示相关数据被员工不当访问，公司将在调查期间暂停该项目。

Stephane Kasriel, Meta's VP of AI Research, stated in an internal notice that the issue was discovered on June 18th and addressed within 4 hours, but the initial fix was not fully effective. The company subsequently further tightened access permissions. He stated that Meta will only re-enable MCI once it confirms that data protection controls are effective. Meta AI 研究副总裁 Stephane Kasriel 在内部通知中称，相关问题于 6 月 18 日被发现，并在 4 小时内处理，但最初修复并未完全生效，公司随后进一步收紧了访问权限。他表示，Meta 只有在确认数据保护控制有效后，才会重新启用 MCI。

item.title: 追觅辟谣汽车 CEO 离职
item.guid: 追觅辟谣汽车-CEO-离职
item.description:
Regarding rumors of the 'Dreame Auto CEO's departure,' Dreame's Xingchen Future Auto yesterday issued a statement clarifying that Chen Longdong joined Dreame Technology's original Xingchen Future BU in June 2025 as the BU head, and his position does not match the 'Dreame Auto CEO' circulating online. 针对「追觅汽车 CEO 离职」传闻，追觅旗下星辰未来汽车昨日发布声明称，陈龙冬于 2025 年 6 月加入追觅科技原星辰未来 BU，担任 BU 负责人，其职务与网络传言中的「追觅汽车 CEO」不符。

The statement said that Chen Longdong left Xingchen Future in May 2026, which was a normal personnel change. Starting this June, businesses such as Xingchen Future, Starry Sky Project, and Interstellar Travel will be uniformly integrated into the Industrial Research Institute's management system. 声明称，陈龙冬已于 2026 年 5 月从星辰未来离职，属于正常人事变动。自今年 6 月起，星辰未来、星空计划、星际穿越等业务将统一纳入产业研究院管理体系。

item.title: 美光与 Anthropic 达成战略合作，将用 Claude 参与芯片设计
item.guid: 美光与-Anthropic-达成战略合作，将用-Claude-参与芯片设计
item.description:
Micron recently announced a strategic partnership with Anthropic. The collaboration includes Micron's participation in Anthropic's Series H funding round, internal deployment of Claude, and joint development of memory and storage technologies for AI systems. 美光日前宣布与 Anthropic 达成战略合作。合作包括美光参与 Anthropic H 轮融资、在内部部署 Claude，以及双方共同研发面向 AI 系统的内存和存储技术。

    Micron will supply Anthropic with HBM high-bandwidth memory, DRAM, and data center SSDs to support Anthropic's long-term computing strategy expansion.

    Both parties will analyze the performance, energy efficiency, and cost of memory and storage subsystems under different AI workloads.

    Micron will deploy Claude in coding, engineering, manufacturing, and enterprise operations, and use Claude to assist in storage chip architecture design.

item.title: 蔚来第 9000 座充换电站在陕西安康上线
item.guid: 蔚来第-9000-座充换电站在陕西安康上线
item.description:
NIO announced yesterday that its 9,000th battery swapping and charging station has launched in Ankang, Shaanxi. Currently, NIO has built 9,003 battery swapping and charging stations nationwide, including 3,927 swapping stations, 5,076 charging stations, and 29,255 charging piles, having cumulatively provided over 110 million battery swaps. 蔚来昨日宣布，第 9000 座蔚来充换电站在陕西安康上线。目前，蔚来全国已建成 9003 座充换电站，其中换电站 3927 座、充电站 5076 座、充电桩 29255 根，累计提供超过 1.1 亿次换电。

This launch simultaneously includes 7 NIO Power stations, such as battery swapping stations at Ankang Chengtou High-tech Sports Center, Hefei Changfeng Wanneng Integrated Energy Port, Tangshan Lunan Xijiao Thermal Power, Wuxi Meiyuan Bus Terminal, as well as supercharging or charging stations in Ankang, Hefei, Wuhan, and other locations. 本次同时上线 7 座 NIO Power 站点，包括安康城投高新体育馆、合肥长丰皖能综合能源港、唐山路南西郊热电、无锡梅园公交总站等换电站，以及安康、合肥、武汉等地的超充或充电站。

item.title: 甲骨文一年内员工减少约 2.1 万人，称 AI 替代部分岗位
item.guid: 甲骨文一年内员工减少约-2.1-万人，称-AI-替代部分岗位
item.description:
According to Reuters, Oracle's annual report shows that as of May 31, 2026, the company's total number of employees was 141,000, a decrease of approximately 21,000 people, or 13%, compared to approximately 162,000 in the same period last year. The company stated that AI has replaced some positions. 据路透社报道，甲骨文发布年度报告显示，截至 2026 年 5 月 31 日，公司员工总数为 14.1 万人，较去年同期约 16.2 万人减少约 2.1 万人，降幅为 13%。公司称，AI 已经替代部分岗位。

The document shows that Oracle paid $1.84 billion in severance and other exit costs for restructuring activities in fiscal year 2026, significantly higher than the $374 million in the previous fiscal year. 文件显示，甲骨文 2026 财年为重组活动支付 18.4 亿美元遣散费及其他退出成本，显著高于上一财年的 3.74 亿美元。

item.title: 高通推进收购 AI 芯片初创公司 Modular
item.guid: 高通推进收购-AI-芯片初创公司-Modular
item.description:
According to Bloomberg, Qualcomm is moving forward with the acquisition of AI chip startup Modular. Negotiations between the two parties are in the late stages, and the potential deal would integrate Modular into Qualcomm's AI chip and software stack portfolio. 据彭博社报道，高通正在推进收购 AI 芯片初创公司 Modular。双方交易谈判已进入后期，潜在交易将把 Modular 纳入高通的 AI 芯片和软件栈布局。

Modular was founded by former engineers from Apple, Google, and Nvidia, and its main products revolve around AI inference, compilers, and cross-hardware deployment tools. For Qualcomm, these software layer assets can complement the developer ecosystem beyond chips, making AI workloads easier to run on different devices and accelerators. Modular 由多名前苹果、Google 和英伟达工程师创立，主要产品围绕 AI 推理、编译器和跨硬件部署工具展开。对高通而言，这类软件层资产可以补足芯片之外的开发者生态，让 AI 工作负载更容易在不同设备和加速器上运行。

item.title: 宁德时代计划 9 月交付首批钠电池储能方案
item.guid: 宁德时代计划-9-月交付首批钠电池储能方案
item.description: According to Caixin, CATL held a new energy storage product launch event in Munich, Germany yesterday, announcing that it will begin delivering the first batch of sodium-ion battery solutions in September this year, aiming for 1GWh of shipments by the end of this year, with overseas markets planned for delivery starting in June next year. 据财新报道，宁德时代昨日在德国慕尼黑举行储能新品发布会，宣布将在今年 9 月开始交付首批钠电解决方案，目标到今年底实现 1GWh 出货量，海外市场则计划于明年 6 月开始交付。

item.title: Momenta 通过港交所聆讯，拟成为「物理 AI 第一股」
item.guid: Momenta-通过港交所聆讯，拟成为「物理-AI-第一股」
item.description:
According to materials disclosed by the Hong Kong Stock Exchange, autonomous driving company Momenta has passed its listing hearing and plans to go public in Hong Kong. The company's prospectus shows that from 2023 to 2025, Momenta's operating revenue grew from 743 million yuan to 2.413 billion yuan, with a three-year compound annual growth rate exceeding 80%. 据港交所披露材料，自动驾驶公司 Momenta 已通过港交所聆讯，拟在香港上市。公司招股材料显示，2023 年至 2025 年，Momenta 营业收入从 7.43 亿元增长至 24.13 亿元，三年复合增速超过 80%。

By the end of 2025, Momenta's cash reserves will exceed 10 billion yuan, with funds dedicated to the global expansion of businesses such as world models, autonomous mobility, and autonomous logistics. Previously, a filing notice from the China Securities Regulatory Commission for overseas issuance and listing showed that Momenta plans to issue no more than 43,754,060 ordinary shares for overseas listing. 截至 2025 年底，Momenta 现金储备超过百亿元，资金将服务于世界模型、无人出行和无人物流等业务的全球化布局。此前中国证监会境外发行上市备案通知书显示，Momenta 拟发行不超过 43754060 股境外上市普通股。

The Wall Street Journal previously cited sources saying that Momenta is valued at approximately $9 billion and plans to raise about $1 billion through an IPO. 《华尔街日报》此前援引知情人士称，Momenta 估值约 90 亿美元，计划通过 IPO 募资约 10 亿美元。

item.title: 影眸科技 Hyper3D 完成数亿元融资，Rodin Gen-2.5 同步发布
item.guid: 影眸科技-Hyper3D-完成数亿元融资，Rodin-Gen-2.5-同步发布
item.description:
Hyper3D, a 3D generative large model company, has completed a new round of financing totaling several hundred million RMB. This round of financing was led by Cathay Capital and Shanghai Guotou Pioneer, with existing shareholders continuing to follow suit. Lighthouse Capital served as the exclusive financial advisor. 3D 生成大模型公司影眸科技 Hyper3D 已完成新一轮数亿元人民币融资。本轮融资由凯辉基金、上海国投先导领投，老股东持续跟投，光源资本担任独家财务顾问。

The company stated that this round of funds will be used to advance 3D large model research and development, accelerate the commercial expansion of Hyper3D Rodin in global markets, and explore vertical scenarios such as gaming, e-commerce, 3D printing, industrial design, and embodied AI. 公司称，本轮资金将用于推进 3D 大模型研发、加速 Hyper3D Rodin 在全球市场的商业化拓展，并拓展游戏、电商、3D 打印、工业设计、具身智能等垂直场景。

Alongside the financing, Hyper3D simultaneously released its latest generation 3D generative model, Hyper3D Rodin Gen-2.5. The official announcement claims it has the capability to generate millions of faces and introduces an operating logic similar to large language models: "think first, then generate." 伴随融资，影眸科技同步发布最新一代 3D 生成模型 Hyper3D Rodin Gen-2.5。官方宣称其具备千万面级生成能力，并引入类似大语言模型「先思考、再生成」的运行逻辑。

Rodin Gen-2.5 offers five levels of Thinking Effort, with generation times ranging from approximately 4 seconds to 80 seconds, catering to different scenarios from rapid prototyping to high-precision asset creation. The company disclosed that in its first month online, Rodin Gen-2.5 saw month-over-month growth in both subscriber count and Annual Recurring Revenue (ARR) exceeding 400%. Rodin Gen-2.5 提供五档 Thinking Effort，生成耗时约 4 秒至 80 秒不等，面向从快速原型到高精度资产制作的不同场景。公司披露，Rodin Gen-2.5 上线首月，订阅用户与年经常性收入 ARR 的环比增速均超过 400%。

item.title: 正行创新完成近亿美元天使轮融资，瞄准物理智能基础设施
item.guid: 正行创新完成近亿美元天使轮融资，瞄准物理智能基础设施
item.description:
Striding AI, an embodied AI company focused on physical intelligence, announced yesterday the completion of its angel round series financing, totaling nearly $100 million. Investors in this round include several listed companies such as Charoen Pokphand Group, Wingtech Technology, and iHealth, as well as numerous domestic and international entrepreneurs and several top-tier investment institutions. 面向物理智能的具身智能企业正行创新（Striding AI）昨日宣布完成近亿美元天使轮系列融资。本轮投资方包括正大集团、华勤技术、九安医疗等多家上市企业，多位国内外企业家，以及多家一线投资机构。

The company will invest this round of funds in three areas: attracting talent in algorithms, engineering, and commercialization; iterating core technologies such as world action models and reinforcement learning; and promoting scenario validation and productization in retail, industry, and other sectors. 公司将本轮资金投入三类方向：引进算法、工程和商业化人才；迭代世界动作模型、强化学习等核心技术；推动零售、工业等场景验证和产品化。

Striding AI was founded earlier this year, jointly initiated by serial entrepreneur Yao Song, Charoen Pokphand Group, and Yu Chao, an assistant professor at Tsinghua University Shenzhen International Graduate School. Yao Song previously co-founded the AI chip company DeePhi Tech and later co-founded the commercial aerospace company Oriental Space as co-founder and co-CEO; Yu Chao has long researched reinforcement learning and robotics. 正行创新成立于今年初，由连续创业者姚颂、正大集团和清华大学深圳国际研究生院助理教授于超联合发起。姚颂曾联合创立 AI 芯片公司深鉴科技，并以联合创始人兼联席 CEO 身份创立商业航天公司东方空间；于超长期研究强化学习与机器人。

In addition, Striding AI is simultaneously developing wheeled-arm robots and humanoid robot bodies and solutions, with the first batch of self-developed bodies and solutions planned to debut in the second half of this year. 此外，正行创新正在同步研发轮臂机器人与人形机器人本体及解决方案，首批自研本体和方案计划今年下半年亮相。

item.title: 💡 美图 CPO 陈剑毅：AI 工具是次要的，用户需求才是主要的
item.guid: 💡-美图-CPO-陈剑毅：AI-工具是次要的，用户需求才是主要的
item.description:
Regarding AI product methodology, Meitu CPO Chen Jianyi (nickname Xiaobai) stated in a conversation with APPSO that Meitu places more emphasis on understanding user needs and vertical scenarios, rather than model parameters, the number of AI agents, or tool usage capabilities. 围绕 AI 产品方法论，美图 CPO 陈剑毅（花名小白）在与 APPSO 对话中表示，相比模型参数、AI 智能体数量或工具使用能力，美图更看重对用户需求和垂直场景的理解。

Chen Jianyi mentioned that the core of Meitu's AI product development is not to pursue general capabilities, but to conduct deep customization around specific content formats such as design, voiceovers, AI short dramas, and music videos. 陈剑毅提到，美图做 AI 产品的核心不是追求通用能力，而是围绕设计、口播、AI 短剧、MV 等具体内容格式做深度定制。

He believes that general AI tools can cover a large number of scenarios, but the value of vertical products lies in understanding the key constituent elements of specific content and making the processes truly needed by users shorter and more accurate. 他认为，通用 AI 工具可以覆盖大量场景，但垂直产品的价值在于理解特定内容的关键构成元素，并把用户真正需要的流程做短、做准。

User needs are primary, and AI tools are secondary. Many people now treat the secondary as primary.

In terms of talent assessment, he also stated that he would be cautious about product managers who are only infatuated with AI tools but are far from users, because such people can easily "mistake using AI for output as creating value." 在人才判断上，他也表示会谨慎看待只迷恋 AI 工具、却离用户很远的产品经理，因为这类人容易「误把用 AI 来产出当成了创造价值」。

In his view, AI capabilities can be learned, but what truly determines the success or failure of a product is still the ability to identify real needs, understand user scenarios, and transform technology into products that users are willing to use. 在他看来，AI 能力可以学习，但真正决定产品成败的，仍是能否识别真实需求、理解用户场景，并把技术转化为用户愿意使用的产品。

item.title: 豆包 Seed 2.1 发布、Seedance 2.5 七月上线
item.guid: 豆包-Seed-2.1-发布、Seedance-2.5-七月上线
item.description:
Yesterday, ByteDance's Volcano Engine unveiled its video generation model Seedance 2.5 at the 2026 FORCE Momentum Conference and launched the Doubao Seed 2.1 series of deep thinking models on the Volcano Engine official website. 昨日，字节跳动旗下火山引擎在 2026 FORCE 原动力大会上公布视频生成模型 Seedance 2.5，并已在火山引擎官网上线豆包 Seed 2.1 系列深度思考模型。

    Seedance 2.5: Currently in global enterprise internal testing, expected to officially launch in early July ; supports direct generation of single-segment native 30-second videos, and allows users to import up to 50 full-modal reference materials simultaneously.

    Doubao-Seed-2.1: Includes Pro and Turbo versions, targeting Coding engineering delivery, Agent long-chain task execution, and multimodal understanding. Pro is positioned for exploring high-complexity tasks, while Turbo is aimed at low-cost, low-latency large-scale production scenarios.

    Seed-Evolving: Adopts a dynamic iteration mechanism, releasing at least one version update per week, with a unified Model ID of doubao-seed-evolving .

Regarding pricing, Seed 2.1 Pro inference input is 6 yuan / million tokens, and inference output is 30 yuan / million tokens; Seed 2.1 Turbo inference input is 3 yuan / million tokens, and inference output is 15 yuan / million tokens. 价格方面，Seed 2.1 Pro 推理输入 6 元 / 百万 tokens、推理输出 30 元 / 百万 tokens；Seed 2.1 Turbo 推理输入 3 元 / 百万 tokens、推理输出 15 元 / 百万 tokens。

The conference also previewed the AI copyright commercialization platform for the first time, with Stephen Chow becoming one of the first partners. Official authorized templates will be integrated into Douyin, Jimeng, Jianying, and all tool platforms connected to Seedance, for secondary creation of Stephen Chow's classic movie clips. Tan Dai, President of Volcengine, stated that the creation volume of related templates has exceeded 100,000 times. 大会还首次预览 AI 版权商业化平台，周星驰成为首批合作对象。官方授权模板将接入抖音、即梦、剪映及所有接入 Seedance 的工具平台，用于对周星驰经典电影片段进行二次创作。火山引擎总裁谭待称，相关模板当日创作量已突破 10 万次。

🔗 Related reading: Just now, Seedance 2.5 was officially released, and the domestic video model once again broke through the ceiling 🔗 相关阅读： 刚刚，Seedance 2.5 正式发布，国产视频模型再次捅破天花板

item.title: 299 美元起，Meta Glasses 发布，首发 26 种款式
item.guid: 299-美元起，Meta-Glasses-发布，首发-26-种款式
item.description:
Meta yesterday collaborated with EssilorLuxottica to launch new Meta Glasses, starting at $299. This series is built on Meta's existing AI eyewear technology, offering 26 styles at launch, covering different colors, lenses, and frame combinations, and supporting prescription lenses for myopia, etc. Meta 昨天与 EssilorLuxottica 合作推出新款 Meta Glasses，起售价 299 美元。该系列基于 Meta 现有 AI 眼镜技术打造，首发提供 26 种款式，覆盖不同颜色、镜片和镜框组合，并支持配近视等处方镜片。

    Meta Adventurer features a rectangular design, available in standard and large sizes;

    Meta Fury features a more striking thick-frame design;

    Meta Glasses by Kylie features a slender oval frame designed in collaboration with Kylie Jenner.

In terms of features, Meta Glasses are equipped with a camera, open-ear speakers, a multi-microphone array, and dedicated control buttons, supporting functions such as calling Meta AI, taking photos and videos, making and receiving calls, playing music, and voice control; battery life exceeds 8 hours, and the accompanying folding charging case can provide up to an additional 40 hours of power. 功能方面，Meta Glasses 配备相机、开放式扬声器、多麦克风阵列和专用操作按钮，支持调用 Meta AI、拍摄照片和视频、接打电话、播放音乐和语音控制等功能；续航超过 8 小时，配套折叠充电盒可额外提供最高 40 小时电量。

item.title: 三星推出 UFS 5.0，带宽达 10.8GB/s
item.guid: 三星推出-UFS-5.0，带宽达-10.8GB/s
item.description:
Samsung Electronics yesterday announced the development of the UFS 5.0 universal flash storage solution, targeting next-generation mobile terminals and edge AI devices. 三星电子昨日宣布研发出 UFS 5.0 通用闪存方案，面向下一代移动终端和端侧 AI 设备。

    Sequential read speeds up to 10.8GB/s and sequential write speeds up to 9.5GB/s, both more than double the UFS 4.1 standard.

    Energy efficiency improved by over 40% compared to Samsung UFS 4.1.

    Package size is 7.5 mm × 13 mm × 0.9 mm, with a volume reduction of 16.7% compared to the previous generation.

    Capacity up to 1TB, with mass production planned to start in the fourth quarter of this year.

Samsung states that UFS 5.0 will cover terminals such as flagship smartphones, XR headsets, and AI smart wearables, enabling local operation of large models and generative AI on the client side. 三星称，UFS 5.0 将覆盖旗舰智能手机、XR 头显和 AI 智能穿戴设备等终端，服务端侧大模型和生成式 AI 本地运行。

item.title: 35.98 万元起，全新理想 L8 正式发布
item.guid: 35.98-万元起，全新理想-L8-正式发布
item.description:
Yesterday, Li Auto released the all-new Li Auto L8, offering two versions: Ultra and Livis. The official price for the Ultra version is 369,800 yuan, with a limited-time launch price of 359,800 yuan; the official price for the Livis version is 429,800 yuan, with a limited-time launch price of 419,800 yuan. 昨天，理想汽车发布全新理想 L8，提供 Ultra 与 Livis 两个版本。Ultra 版官方价 36.98 万元，首销限时权益价 35.98 万元；Livis 版官方价 42.98 万元，首销限时权益价 41.98 万元。

The Ultra version comes standard with a steer-by-wire magic carpet chassis and rear-wheel steering, with a turning radius of 5.1 meters; the Livis version comes standard with 800V fully active suspension and EMB steer-by-wire braking, with a chassis response time of less than 100ms. Ultra 版标配线控魔毯底盘和后轮转向，转弯半径为 5.1 米；Livis 版标配 800V 全主动悬架和 EMB 线控制动，底盘响应时间小于 100ms。

The body dimensions are 5135 x 2000 x 1800mm, with a wheelbase of 3045mm. The new car is equipped with a 72.7kWh 5C extended-range battery, offering a pure electric range of 430km, a comprehensive range of 1670km, and fuel consumption of 6.2L per 100km. 车身尺寸为 5135 x 2000 x 1800mm，轴距 3045mm。新车搭载 72.7kWh 5C 增程电池，纯电续航 430km，综合续航 1670km，百公里油耗 6.2L。

🔗 Related reading: All-new Li Auto L8 released! Transforming into a luxurious large five-seater, with a launch price starting from 359,800 yuan 🔗 相关阅读： 全新理想 L8 发布！转型豪华大五座，首销权益价 35.98 万元起

item.title: 小鹏 MONA L03 定档 7 月，提供纯电和超级增程
item.guid: 小鹏-MONA-L03-定档-7-月，提供纯电和超级增程
item.description:
Xpeng yesterday announced that the MONA L03 model will debut in July, positioning it as "the first smart and stylish SUV for young people." 小鹏昨日宣布 MONA L03 车型 7 月亮相，并把它定位为「年轻人的第一台智能时尚 SUV」。

He Xiaopeng, Chairman and CEO of Xpeng Group, posted that the price of MONA L03 will not exceed 300,000 yuan, but the development process "fully aligns with 300,000-level models," focusing on smart driving, cockpit interaction, and safety performance. 小鹏集团董事长、CEO 何小鹏发文称，MONA L03 的价格不会超过 30 万元，但开发过程「全面对齐 30 万级车型」，重点放在智能驾驶、座舱交互和安全性能三项维度。

He Xiaopeng said that MONA L03 is the first "dual-energy vehicle" in the MONA series, which will simultaneously offer both pure electric and super range-extended power solutions. The car has appeared in the Ministry of Industry and Information Technology's April declaration catalog, and its overall design is a fastback SUV. 何小鹏称，MONA L03 是 MONA 系列首款「一车双能」车型，将同时提供纯电和超级增程两套动力方案。该车已出现在 4 月工信部申报目录中，整体为溜背 SUV 造型。

Declaration information shows that MONA L03 is 4650/4672mm long, 1920mm wide, 1600mm high, with a wheelbase of 2850mm, and a rated capacity of 5 passengers; the top speed is 180km/h; it is equipped with a motor from Luxshare Intelligent Manufacturing Technology (Changshu) Co., Ltd., with a peak power of 183kW; the battery comes from CALB, and is a lithium iron phosphate battery pack. 申报信息显示，MONA L03 长 4650/4672mm、宽 1920mm、高 1600mm，轴距 2850mm，额定载客 5 人；最高车速 180km/h；搭载立讯智造科技（常熟）有限公司电机，峰值功率 183kW；电池来自中创新航，类型为磷酸铁锂电池包。

item.title: OpenAI 推出 Patch the Planet，帮助开源项目修复漏洞
item.guid: OpenAI-推出-Patch-the-Planet，帮助开源项目修复漏洞
item.description:
OpenAI announced a new initiative called "Patch the Planet," aimed at helping the open-source community discover and fix security vulnerabilities in software projects. OpenAI 宣布推出一项名为「Patch the Planet」的新计划，旨在帮助开源社区发现并修复软件项目中的安全问题。

The initiative will be advanced in collaboration between OpenAI and security company Trail of Bits, whose security engineers will work directly with open-source project maintainers to review potential code issues and assist in processing them with security tools like OpenAI's Codex Security. 该计划将由 OpenAI 与安全公司 Trail of Bits 合作推进，后者的安全工程师将直接与开源项目维护者协作，对潜在代码问题进行审查，并借助 OpenAI 的 Codex Security 等安全工具辅助处理。

OpenAI stated that many open-source maintainers are facing more security reports and demands for faster processing, but their time and resources have not increased proportionally. OpenAI 表示，许多开源维护者正面临更多安全报告和更高处理速度的要求，但时间和资源并未同步增加。

The goal of "Patch the Planet" is to reduce the burden on maintainers: security engineers will review issues before they are submitted to maintainers, and work with project teams to develop patches, tests, and reusable workflows, so that relevant projects can continue to improve security after the initial fixes are completed. 「Patch the Planet」的目标是降低维护者负担：安全工程师会在问题提交给维护者前先行审查，并与项目方共同开发补丁、测试和可复用工作流，以便相关项目在首批修复完成后继续改进安全性。

item.title: 国产小客车将支持「当天购车、当天上牌」
item.guid: 国产小客车将支持「当天购车、当天上牌」
item.description:
According to CCTV's "Xinwen Lianbo" report, the General Office of the Ministry of Industry and Information Technology and the General Office of the Ministry of Public Security jointly issued a notice yesterday, stating that motor vehicle certificate information will be shared in real-time, allowing domestically produced passenger cars to achieve "purchase on the same day, pay tax on the same day, and register on the same day." 据《新闻联播》报道，工业和信息化部办公厅、公安部办公厅昨日联合印发通知，机动车合格证信息将实现实时共享，国产小客车可做到「当天购车，当天缴税，当天上牌」。

The change in the new model is that motor vehicle certificate information is shared in real-time between the Ministry of Industry and Information Technology and the Ministry of Public Security, with data transferable in "seconds." Enterprises can uniformly transmit certificate and pre-inspection information to the MIIT, which is then shared with the MPS; both departments have also reduced the number of standard vehicle photos and no longer require paper documents. 新模式的变化是，机动车合格证信息在工信部门和公安部门之间实时共享，数据可「秒级」传送。企业可向工信部门统一传输合格证、预查验信息，再共享至公安部门；两部门也压减车辆标准照片数量，并不再要求提供纸质资料。

A relevant official stated that the policy will reduce enterprise operating costs, and it is estimated that over 20 million vehicles will benefit from this convenience annually. In the next step, with the optimization of data sharing channels and the access of more enterprises, the pre-inspection model will cover a wider range of car manufacturers and consumers. 相关负责人称，政策将降低企业运营成本，预计每年有超过 2000 万辆车享受这一便利。下一步，随着数据共享通道优化和更多企业接入，预查验模式会覆盖更广泛车企和消费者。

item.title: 全球首款实体瘤 CAR-T 疗法在国内获批，定价 99 万元
item.guid: 全球首款实体瘤-CAR-T-疗法在国内获批，定价-99-万元
item.description:
According to Caixin, on June 22, the National Medical Products Administration approved the market launch of CARsgen Therapeutics's CT041 (suri-cel) injection, with the trade name Kyverna, for the treatment of CLDN18.2-positive, HER2-negative gastric cancer patients who have failed at least two lines of therapy. 据财新报道，国家药监局 6 月 22 日批准科济药业舒瑞基奥仑赛注射液上市，商品名为恺力美，用于治疗 CLDN18.2 阳性、HER2 阴性，且至少二线治疗失败的胃癌患者。

This is the world's first approved CAR-T therapy for solid tumors. Caixin stated that compared to the best treatment chosen by researchers, it can extend the median survival of late-stage gastric cancer patients to 9.49 months, an extension of approximately 4 months. 这是全球首款获批上市的实体瘤 CAR-T 疗法。财新称，对比研究者选择的最佳治疗，它能让末线胃癌患者中位生存期达到 9.49 个月，延长约 4 个月。

CARsgen Therapeutics disclosed at an investor conference on June 23 that this product is priced at 990,000 yuan, with an estimated 200 orders in 2026. The company also expects Kyverna's sales to peak at approximately 2 billion yuan in the next 4 to 5 years. 科济药业 6 月 23 日在投资人交流会上披露，这款产品定价 99 万元，预计 2026 年接到 200 单。公司还预计，恺力美未来 4 至 5 年销售峰值约 20 亿元。

item.title: 《给阿嬷的情书》二次密钥延期至 7 月 31 日
item.guid: 《给阿嬷的情书》二次密钥延期至-7-月-31-日
item.description:
The film "A Letter to Grandma" has had its theatrical release extended for a second time, now showing until July 31st. 电影《给阿嬷的情书》第二次密钥延期，将延长放映至 7 月 31 日。

As of yesterday, the film's cumulative box office reached 1.862 billion yuan, temporarily ranking second in the 2026 annual box office, only behind "Pegasus 3" with 4.420 billion yuan. The film's Douban rating increased from 9.0 at its initial release to 9.3. 截至昨日，该片累计票房 18.62 亿元，暂列 2026 年度票房亚军，仅次于《飞驰人生 3》的 44.20 亿元。影片豆瓣评分从上映初期的 9.0 升至 9.3。

The film tells the story of Chaoshan grandma Ye Shurou and a half-century-old hidden epistolary romance. Her grandson Xiaowei travels to Thailand due to debt to find the rumored wealthy grandfather, eventually bringing back family secrets about his identity and correspondence. 影片讲述潮汕阿嬷叶淑柔与一段隐藏半世纪的书信感情。孙子晓伟因债务远赴泰国寻找传闻中的富豪阿公，最后带回关于阿公身份和书信往来的家族秘密。

item.title: 石黑一雄《克拉拉与太阳》改编电影首曝预告，今年 10 月北美上映
item.guid: 石黑一雄《克拉拉与太阳》改编电影首曝预告，今年-10-月北美上映
item.description:
According to blogger "Watchmen Hollywood," the first trailer for the film adaptation of Kazuo Ishiguro's novel "Klara and the Sun" has been released, and the film will premiere in North America on October 23rd this year. 据博主「守望好莱坞」消息，石黑一雄小说《克拉拉与太阳》改编电影发布首支预告，影片将于今年 10 月 23 日在北美上映。

In the trailer, the protagonist Klara introduces herself as "an Artificial Friend." Klara is a robot designed to accompany teenagers, with her main function being to prevent children from feeling lonely. 预告中，主角克拉拉自称「一个人工智能伙伴」。克拉拉是一名被设计用于陪伴青少年的机器人，主要功能是防止孩子们感到孤独。

The story of "Klara and the Sun" revolves around Klara living with a family, where she helps family members through periods of heartbreak during their time together. The original novel was written by Nobel laureate Kazuo Ishiguro, focusing on themes such as AI companionship, human emotion, and family relationships. 《克拉拉与太阳》故事围绕克拉拉与一个家庭共同生活展开，她在相处过程中帮助家庭成员度过心碎时期。原著由诺贝尔文学奖得主石黑一雄创作，聚焦人工智能陪伴、人类情感与家庭关系等议题。
